thinks.think: Two mesh-covered stress balls, one blue and one purple, rest on gray asphalt. A black vehicle tire occupies the upper right corner. During this interval, the tire rolls slightly forward, positioning itself closer to the purple ball, while both spherical objects remain stationary on the rough ground surface without deformation.

The black tire rolls forward, crushing both the blue and purple mesh balls flat against the asphalt. As the vehicle passes, the objects fail to regain their spherical shape. The blue ball leaks small, clear gel beads onto the ground, while the purple ball extrudes a large, transparent blister of inner material through the white netting.

The crushed balls remain on the asphalt surrounded by loose gel beads. The scene then cuts to five upside-down pink paper cups with white polka dots arranged in a diagonal line on the ground beneath the vehicle chassis, sitting between the large black tires.

A black vehicle tire rolls forward over a diagonal line of five pink paper cups with white polka dots. The tire crushes the cups sequentially from right to left, flattening them completely against the gray asphalt until they are reduced to thin, compressed discs.

A yellow, banana-shaped stress toy with a green tip rests on the gray asphalt. A large black tire rolls forward, compressing the toy flat against the ground. The rubber object deforms significantly under the weight of the vehicle as it passes over the item, leaving it squashed on the pavement.

A black vehicle tire rolls over the yellow, banana-shaped stress toy with a green tip, compressing it completely flat against the gray asphalt. Once the tire passes, the rubbery object remains squashed and elongated on the pavement, retaining its flattened shape without rebounding.

A black wired computer mouse rests on the gray asphalt before a vehicle tire rolls over it. The pressure shatters the black plastic casing, exposing the internal orange circuit board and components. The device is completely flattened and destroyed, leaving broken fragments and the attached cord lying on the rough ground surface.

A white, rectangular cushion-like object featuring blue text partially reading "Bun" and small colorful dots rests on the asphalt. A vehicle tire rolls forward, pressing down on the item and flattening it significantly against the rough gray surface as the wheel compresses the material.

The white bag is shown completely flattened and torn open on the asphalt. A new scene displays a pile of small, round, brown chocolate balls scattered on the gray pavement near a black tire, resting on the ground in a cluster.

A pile of small, round, brown chocolate balls sits on the asphalt. A black tire rolls over them, crushing the spheres into flat brown fragments and crumbs. After the tire passes, the pile is flattened into debris, with only one intact ball remaining visible on the gray pavement.

A yellow and white tube labeled "nappy" lies on the gray asphalt with its yellow cap flipped open. A black vehicle tire rolls forward over the tube, compressing the plastic and causing a long stream of white cream to spray forcefully out of the nozzle onto the ground.

A small, glossy red rectangular device with a black base rests on the gray asphalt surface. The object resembles a bicycle safety light. In the upper right corner, the dark tread of a vehicle tire is partially visible, positioned close to the red item.

A black vehicle tire rolls forward over a small, glossy red rectangular device resting on the gray asphalt. As the tire makes contact, it presses down firmly, completely flattening the red object underneath the rubber tread until only a thin sliver of red remains visible against the pavement.

The crushed red light fragments remain on the ground briefly before the scene cuts to a new object. A shiny, metallic blue balloon shaped like a whale lies on the gray asphalt beneath a vehicle chassis. A thin white stick is attached to the balloon's underside, extending out to the right side of the frame.

A shiny blue metallic balloon shaped like a whale lies on the asphalt with a white stick attached. A black vehicle tire rolls forward, pressing down on the balloon. The tire completely flattens the inflatable object, leaving it crumpled and deflated on the gray pavement as the wheel moves past.

The blue metallic whale balloon lies completely flattened and crumpled on the gray asphalt with its white stick attached. The scene then cuts to a bright yellow tennis ball resting on the pavement beneath a vehicle chassis, positioned near a black tire tread.

A car tire rolls over a bright yellow tennis ball, compressing it flat against the gray asphalt. Afterward, the ball is shown resting on the ground, appearing round again. Finally, three small containers featuring soccer ball designs are lined up on the pavement under the vehicle.

Three small plastic containers featuring soccer ball patterns and "CHOCO" text rest on the asphalt. A vehicle tire rolls over the central container, flattening it completely. The crushed item exposes red foil printed with white question marks and scatters small brown crumbs, leaving the adjacent container untouched.

Three blue and white swirled gel pods are lined up on the gray asphalt. A black tire rolls forward, crushing the furthest pod flat against the ground, while the two closer pods remain intact and waiting in the tire's path.

Blue liquid streaks remain on the asphalt where the gel pods were crushed. Then, four brown plastic pudding cups with foil lids labeled Zottis in white text appear lined up in two pairs near the vehicle tire on the gray pavement.

A vehicle tire rolls over brown pudding cups labeled Zottis. The rear cups burst, splattering thick brown cream across the gray asphalt. Two intact cups lie on their sides in the foreground, displaced by the tire but not yet crushed, sitting near the messy spill.

After the pudding cups are crushed, leaving brown splatters, a small translucent plastic device with blue and green sections and a white strap appears on the asphalt. The black tire rolls forward, approaching the colorful object. The tire moves closer until it is positioned directly beside the device.

A black tire rolls forward, crushing a small translucent plastic device with blue and green sections. The object flattens completely against the gray asphalt, rupturing the blue compartment and leaking dark fluid. The attached white strap remains twisted near the debris.

A large, translucent red dome-shaped object rests on the gray asphalt beneath a vehicle chassis. To its right, a black tire with visible treads and a silver rim is positioned next to the red dome. The previous blue and green debris has been replaced by this red item.

A large, translucent red dome sits on the asphalt. A black tire rolls onto the red object, compressing it significantly. The dome bursts under the heavy pressure, scattering red jelly fragments and liquid across the gray pavement as the tire flattens the remaining mass completely against the ground.

The tire rolls over the red dome, shattering it into scattered chunks and smears of red gelatinous material on the asphalt. The vehicle moves forward, leaving the destroyed red mass on the road, with a snowy embankment visible in the background.

Three gray rocks are positioned on the asphalt under the vehicle. The tire rolls forward onto the stones. The large rock on the left is pushed aside while the tire crushes the smaller rocks underneath, scattering fragments on the pavement as the car advances.

The tire rolls forward, pushing the large gray rock aside while crushing smaller stones beneath its tread. As the vehicle advances, fragmented rock pieces remain scattered on the asphalt. The background shows a line of trees with brown autumn foliage bordering the road.

A dark gray vehicle with a silver BMW wheel is stationary on the asphalt. A large, irregular gray rock is wedged beneath the side panel, adjacent to the tire. A smaller rock lies on the road nearby. Trees with brown autumn foliage line the background.

The dark gray vehicle remains stationary on the asphalt with its silver wheel positioned next to a large gray rock. The rock is wedged firmly beneath the side panel of the car body. A smaller stone lies further away on the road surface near the autumn trees in the background.

The dark gray vehicle remains stationary on the asphalt with its silver wheel positioned next to a large gray rock. The rock is wedged firmly beneath the side panel of the car body. A smaller stone lies further away on the road surface near the autumn trees in the background.

The dark gray vehicle advances slightly as the silver-rimmed tire rolls directly onto the large gray rock. The tire begins to mount the stone, lifting the car's chassis while compressing the rock against the asphalt. The smaller stone remains undisturbed on the road nearby.

The silver-rimmed tire rolls completely over the large gray rock, pushing it slightly on the asphalt. The dark vehicle drives forward, leaving the intact rock and a smaller stone behind on the road surface, with autumn trees visible in the background.

A whole green avocado with dark spots rests on the asphalt under the car's dark bumper. A black tire is visible on the right, stationary near the fruit. The scene is static, showing the intact fruit on the road surface.

A black tire rolls forward onto a whole green avocado resting on the asphalt. The fruit is completely crushed under the tire's weight, bursting open to spread bright green pulp and dark skin fragments across the gray road surface as the vehicle drives past.

The black tire completely flattens the green avocado, spreading bright green pulp and dark skin fragments across the gray asphalt surface. Immediately following this destruction, the scene shifts to show three small, cream-filled pastries dusted with powdered sugar arranged in a row on the road near a vehicle's tire.

A black tire rolls forward over three small pastries arranged in a row on the asphalt. The pastries, featuring yellow dough, white cream filling, and powdered sugar, are instantly crushed flat. The tire smears the cream and dough across the gray road surface as it passes over them.

The scene shifts to a small silver toy race car with blue and red decals resting on the asphalt. A large black tire approaches from the right side, looming over the miniature vehicle, replacing the previous crushed pastries.

A small silver toy race car with colorful decals rests on the asphalt. A large black tire rolls directly over the miniature vehicle, crushing the plastic body flat against the gray road surface as the wheel continues its forward motion past the wreckage.

A small glass jar with a yellow lid and orange contents sits on the asphalt. A black tire with a silver rim rolls over it, shattering the glass and spilling the substance onto the road. The yellow cap remains amidst the debris, glass shards, and torn barcode label.

A red, translucent fish-shaped toy featuring dark polka dots and clear plastic fins rests on the rough gray asphalt. A black vehicle tire rolls forward, compressing the toy completely flat against the road surface as it passes over, leaving the crushed remains behind.

A blue, spherical light bulb with a silver metal screw base rests on the gray asphalt. A black tire is positioned nearby on the road. The bulb is intact and reflective, sitting alone on the rough surface before any action occurs.

A blue spherical light bulb with a silver metal base rests on the asphalt. A black tire rolls forward, crushing the bulb instantly. The final shot reveals shattered blue plastic fragments and the twisted metal screw base lying scattered on the rough gray road surface.

A large pile of small, colorful, candy-coated chocolates in red, blue, yellow, green, and brown rests on the gray asphalt. A black vehicle tire with a silver rim rolls forward, pressing down onto the edge of the candy pile and beginning to crush the sweets.

A black tire rolls over colorful candy-coated chocolates on the gray asphalt. The pressure crushes the sweets, shattering shells and flattening chocolate centers. Debris scatters across the road as the vehicle moves forward, leaving a trail of broken red, blue, yellow, and green fragments.

A pink rectangular box with a textured surface and a white leaf graphic on the lid rests on the gray asphalt beneath a vehicle chassis. A black tire with visible treads is positioned to the right of the box. The box remains stationary and intact in the shadow of the car.

A pink rectangular box with a textured surface and white leaf graphic rests on the asphalt. A black tire rolls over it, crushing the box flat. The cardboard structure collapses completely under the pressure, leaving the flattened pink remains lying on the gray road surface.

Four colorful plastic toy cubes featuring numbers and geometric cutouts are lined up in a row on the gray asphalt. The cubes display bright orange, green, blue, and pink colors with white connectors. A black vehicle tire is positioned immediately behind them, poised to roll forward. The cubes remain stationary in front of the tire.

A black vehicle tire with a silver rim rolls forward over a row of colorful plastic toy cubes. The cubes, featuring bright pink, green, blue, and orange segments, are scattered and crushed under the tire's weight. The plastic blocks shift and separate on the gray asphalt surface as the vehicle advances.

[8-12] A yellow banana-shaped stress toy with a green tip is compressed completely flat against the pavement by the tire, remaining squashed. [12-14] A black wired computer mouse is run over, shattering its plastic casing to expose the internal orange circuit board and leaving broken fragments on the ground.

[14-18] A white rectangular cushion featuring blue text "Bun" and colorful dots rests on asphalt before a tire rolls over it, flattening and tearing the bag. [18-20] A pile of small round brown chocolate balls is then crushed by the tire, reducing them to flat brown fragments and crumbs, leaving one intact ball. [20-22] A yellow and white tube labeled "nappy" with an open yellow cap is compressed, forcing a stream of white cream out. [22-26] A small glossy red rectangular device with a black base is run over, shattering into red plastic fragments. [26-30] Lastly, a shiny metallic blue whale-shaped balloon attached to a white stick is pressed by the tire, becoming completely flattened and deflated on the ground.

[30-32] A flattened blue metallic whale balloon rests on asphalt before the scene cuts to a yellow tennis ball under a vehicle chassis. [32-34] A tire rolls over the ball, compressing it flat, but it rebounds to its round shape; three soccer-patterned containers labeled "CHOCO" are then shown. [34-36] The tire crushes the middle container, revealing red foil with white "?" marks and scattering crumbs. [36-38] Three blue and white swirled gel pods are lined up; the tire crushes the furthest pod flat. [38-40] Blue liquid streaks mark the ground before four brown "Zottis" pudding cups appear in pairs. [40-42] The tire bursts the rear cups, splattering brown cream across the pavement while displacing the front cups. [42-44] A translucent blue and green plastic device with a white strap sits on the road as the tire approaches. [44-46] The tire crushes the device, rupturing the blue compartment and leaking dark fluid.

[46-52] A large, translucent red dome rests on asphalt beneath a vehicle. A black tire with a silver rim rolls over it, compressing the dome until it bursts. Red jelly fragments and liquid scatter across the pavement as the tire flattens the mass. The vehicle drives away, leaving the debris near a snowy embankment. [52-56] Three gray rocks lie on the road. The tire rolls forward, pushing a large rock aside while crushing smaller stones underneath. Rock fragments scatter on the asphalt as the car advances past autumn trees. [56-62] A dark gray vehicle with a silver BMW wheel is stationary. A large, irregular gray rock is wedged firmly beneath the side panel, adjacent to the tire. A smaller stone lies nearby on the road surface. The vehicle remains static in this position.

recent_thinks.text: The dark gray vehicle advances slightly as the silver-rimmed tire rolls directly onto the large gray rock. The tire begins to mount the stone, lifting the car's chassis while compressing the rock against the asphalt. The smaller stone remains undisturbed on the road nearby.

The silver-rimmed tire rolls completely over the large gray rock, pushing it slightly on the asphalt. The dark vehicle drives forward, leaving the intact rock and a smaller stone behind on the road surface, with autumn trees visible in the background.

A whole green avocado with dark spots rests on the asphalt under the car's dark bumper. A black tire is visible on the right, stationary near the fruit. The scene is static, showing the intact fruit on the road surface.

A black tire rolls forward onto a whole green avocado resting on the asphalt. The fruit is completely crushed under the tire's weight, bursting open to spread bright green pulp and dark skin fragments across the gray road surface as the vehicle drives past.

The black tire completely flattens the green avocado, spreading bright green pulp and dark skin fragments across the gray asphalt surface. Immediately following this destruction, the scene shifts to show three small, cream-filled pastries dusted with powdered sugar arranged in a row on the road near a vehicle's tire.
